ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER.name: ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER
ACUTE_RESPIRATORY_DISORDER.description: Raw concept to mark the acute respiratory disorder event, inputed from 'Observation'

ADMISSION.name: ADMISSION
ADMISSION.description: Raw concept to mark the admission event

ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.name: ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE
ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of ALANINE-AMINOTRANSFERASE

ALBUMIN_MEASURE.name: ALBUMIN_MEASURE
ALBUMIN_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of ALBUMIN by serum, for g/dL units

ANTIBIOTIC_IV_BITZUA.name: ANTIBIOTIC_IV_BITZUA
ANTIBIOTIC_IV_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antibiotic drugs administration event (IV/SC/IM - more severe)

ANTIBIOTIC_PO_BITZUA.name: ANTIBIOTIC_PO_BITZUA
ANTIBIOTIC_PO_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antibiotic drugs administration event (oral - less severe)

ANTIDIABETIC_HIGH_HYPO_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.name: ANTIDIABETIC_HIGH_HYPO_HOSPITAL_BITZUA
ANTIDIABETIC_HIGH_HYPO_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark antidiabetic PO drugs administration event (in hospital) that have high hypoglycemia risk (used only to monitor if were stopped during the first 3 days or after event)

ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.name: ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE
ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of ASPARATE-AMINOTRANSFERASE for U/L units

ATHEROSCLEROSIS.name: ATHEROSCLEROSIS
ATHEROSCLEROSIS.description: Raw concept to mark the atherosclerosis event, inputed from 'Observation'

BASAL_DOSAGE.name: BASAL_DOSAGE
BASAL_DOSAGE.description: Raw numeric concept for BASAL (long term) insulin dosage in units; allowed range 1-300

BASE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE.name: BASE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE
BASE_GLUCOSE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage baseline glycemic state as estimated average glucose in mg/dL, derived from HbA1c when available or first in-admission glucose otherwise

BICARBONATE_BITZUA.name: BICARBONATE_BITZUA
BICARBONATE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark calcium-bicarbonate administration event (IV only)

BICARBONATE_MEASURE.name: BICARBONATE_MEASURE
BICARBONATE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BICARBONATE in units of mmol/l

BLOOD_PRESSURE_DIASTOLIC_MEASURE.name: BLOOD_PRESSURE_DIASTOLIC_MEASURE
BLOOD_PRESSURE_DIASTOLIC_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BLOOD_PRESSURE in DIASTOLIC measure for mmHg units

BLOOD_PRESSURE_SYSTOLIC_MEASURE.name: BLOOD_PRESSURE_SYSTOLIC_MEASURE
BLOOD_PRESSURE_SYSTOLIC_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BLOOD_PRESSURE in SYSTOLIC measure in mmHg units

BMI_MEASURE.name: BMI_MEASURE
BMI_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of BMI

BODY_TEMPERATURE_MEASURE.name: BODY_TEMPERATURE_MEASURE
BODY_TEMPERATURE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage base BODY TEMPERATURE (units Celsius)

BOLUS_DOSAGE.name: BOLUS_DOSAGE
BOLUS_DOSAGE.description: Raw numeric concept for BOLUS (short term) insulin dosage in units; allowed range 1-150

CALCIUM-GLUCONATE_BITZUA.name: CALCIUM-GLUCONATE_BITZUA
CALCIUM-GLUCONATE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark calcium gluconate administration event

CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER.name: CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER
CARDIO-VASCULAR_DISORDER.description: Raw concept to mark a cardio-vascular disorder event, inputed from 'Observation'

CREATINE-KINASE_MEASURE.name: CREATINE-KINASE_MEASURE
CREATINE-KINASE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of creatine kinase in Serum (U/L, no MB measurement)

CREATININE_SERUM_MEASURE.name: CREATININE_SERUM_MEASURE
CREATININE_SERUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of CREATININE by Serum using mg/dL units

DEATH.name: DEATH
DEATH.description: Raw concept to mark the death event

DEXTROSE_BITZUA.name: DEXTROSE_BITZUA
DEXTROSE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark dextrose administration event (IV only)

DIABETES_DIAGNOSIS.name: DIABETES_DIAGNOSIS
DIABETES_DIAGNOSIS.description: Raw concept to mark the diabetes diagnosis event

E-GFR_MEASURE.name: E-GFR_MEASURE
E-GFR_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of E-GFR in units of ml/min/1.73m² or similar. ONLY in available within the data itself, not calculated during ETL

GLUCOSE_MEASURE.name: GLUCOSE_MEASURE
GLUCOSE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of GLUCOSE in units of mg/dL

HEART_RATE_MEASURE.name: HEART_RATE_MEASURE
HEART_RATE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of HEART_RATE in units of BpM

HEMATOCRIT_MEASURE.name: HEMATOCRIT_MEASURE
HEMATOCRIT_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of HEMATOCRIT in units of %

HEMOGLOBIN_MEASURE.name: HEMOGLOBIN_MEASURE
HEMOGLOBIN_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of HEMOGLOBIN in units of g/dL

HEPARIN_IV_BITZUA.name: HEPARIN_IV_BITZUA
HEPARIN_IV_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark heparin administration event (IV - more severe)

HEPARIN_SC_BITZUA.name: HEPARIN_SC_BITZUA
HEPARIN_SC_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark heparin administration event (SC - less severe)

HYPERGLYCEMIA.name: HYPERGLYCEMIA
HYPERGLYCEMIA.description: Raw concept to mark the hyperglycemia event, inputed as 'Observation'

HYPEROSMOLALITY.name: HYPEROSMOLALITY
HYPEROSMOLALITY.description: Raw concept to mark the hyperosmolality event, inputed as 'Observation'

HYPERTONIC-SALINE_BITZUA.name: HYPERTONIC-SALINE_BITZUA
HYPERTONIC-SALINE_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark hypertonic saline administration event (IV only)

HYPOGLYCEMIA.name: HYPOGLYCEMIA
HYPOGLYCEMIA.description: Raw concept to mark the hypoglycemia event, inputed as 'Observation'

INFECTION_WBC_MEASURE.name: INFECTION_WBC_MEASURE
INFECTION_WBC_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of WHITE BLOOD CELLS for infection determination in units of 10³/µL (LEUKOCYTES)

INSULIN_IV_DOSAGE.name: INSULIN_IV_DOSAGE
INSULIN_IV_DOSAGE.description: Raw numeric concept for regular IV insulin dosage in units; allowed range 0.01-100

K-BINDER_BITZUA.name: K-BINDER_BITZUA
K-BINDER_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark potassium binder administration event (oral/ rectal route)

KETOACIDOSIS.name: KETOACIDOSIS
KETOACIDOSIS.description: Raw concept to mark the ketoacidosis event, inputed from 'Observation'

KETONES_SERUM_MEASURE.name: KETONES_SERUM_MEASURE
KETONES_SERUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of KETONES by SERUM in mg/dL units

KETONES_URINE_MEASURE.name: KETONES_URINE_MEASURE
KETONES_URINE_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of KETONES by URINE in mg/dL units

KIDNEY_COMPLICATION.name: KIDNEY_COMPLICATION
KIDNEY_COMPLICATION.description: Raw concept to mark the kidney complication event, inputed from 'Observation', creatinine and e-GFR measures

MEAL.name: MEAL
MEAL.description: Raw concept to manage the assessed meal events in hospitalization

METFORMIN_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.name: METFORMIN_HOSPITAL_BITZUA
METFORMIN_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark METFORMIN drugs administration event (at hospital) that have low hypoglycemia risk (but we'll want to monitor this)

NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER.name: NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER
NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DISORDER.description: Raw concept to mark the nervous system disorder event, inputed as 'Observation'

NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION.name: NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION
NEUROVASCULAR_COMPLICATION.description: Raw concept to mark the neurovascular complication event, inputed as 'Observation'

NEUTROPHILS_MEASURE.name: NEUTROPHILS_MEASURE
NEUTROPHILS_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of Absolute NEUTROPHILS count (ANC) in units of 10e3/uL

PH_MEASURE.name: PH_MEASURE
PH_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood PH (units of mmHg or mg/dL)

PLT_MEASURE.name: PLT_MEASURE
PLT_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood PLT (in units of 10e3/uL)

POTASSIUM_MEASURE.name: POTASSIUM_MEASURE
POTASSIUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood POTASSIUM (K⁺) in units of mmol/L

RELEASE.name: RELEASE
RELEASE.description: Raw concept to mark the release event

RETINOPATHY.name: RETINOPATHY
RETINOPATHY.description: Raw concept to mark the retinopathy event, inputed from 'Observation'

SGLT2_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.name: SGLT2_HOSPITAL_BITZUA
SGLT2_HOSPITAL_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark SGLT2 drugs administration event (at hospital, signaling valuable context) that have high hypoglycemia risk (used only to monitor if were stopped during the first 3 days or after event)

SKIN_ULCER.name: SKIN_ULCER
SKIN_ULCER.description: Raw concept to mark the skin ulcer event, inputed from 'Observation'

SODIUM_MEASURE.name: SODIUM_MEASURE
SODIUM_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of SODIUM (Na⁺) by serum/ blood/ plasma in units of mmol/L

STEROIDS_IV_BITZUA.name: STEROIDS_IV_BITZUA
STEROIDS_IV_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark steroids administration event (IV - more severe)

STEROIDS_PO_BITZUA.name: STEROIDS_PO_BITZUA
STEROIDS_PO_BITZUA.description: Raw concept to mark steroids administration event (PO - oral route)

TROPONIN_MEASURE.name: TROPONIN_MEASURE
TROPONIN_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of TROPONIN in units of ng/L

UREA_MEASURE.name: UREA_MEASURE
UREA_MEASURE.description: Raw concept to manage the measurement of blood/ serum/ plasma UREA in units of mg/dL

WEIGHT_MEASURE.name: WEIGHT_MEASURE
WEIGHT_MEASURE.description: Raw concept for measurement of WEIGHT (in KG), used to assess proper medication dosages
